content_body: We had a great time at Rolling River. We made some drinks, watched reality TV and some great movies. My sisters made some great food (I can't cook) and we ate too much junk food. We waved at the people on the train while we stood on the balcony. We also walked up and down to the water and train tracks. Take pictures to capture the memories you will make here. We will be back!!!!
title: Girls Weekend in the North Georgia Mountains
